subject: GuardiCoretrialatPayPal.pdf
body:
Hi Jeff
Pl find a one pager on Guardicore in re to PayPal. 
The CEO Pavel Gurvitch contact info will follow in 10 min. 
Sent from HongKong ( great place. You don't hear on neither Gaza nor Ferguson Missouri. 
Try to pass it to PayPal and let me know if they need anything else. They can contact directly GC or ask that GC will contact them. 
Thx. Best
EB
